name: Silver
help: eBPF network accountability — correlate every packet to process, protocol, purpose, target
long_help:
Silver deploys 6 eBPF programs (cgroup/sock_create, cgroup/connect4, sock_ops, XDP, TC ingress/egress via TCX) for full packet accountability on Linux.

Sub-commands:
  silver start     — Load BPF programs, attach to cgroup + interface
  silver stop      — Detach all BPF programs, clean up maps
  silver flows     — Dump flow table (5-tuple → process + protocol + DNS)
  silver stats     — Dump per-reason aggregate counters
  silver dns       — Dump DNS resolution cache (IP → domain)
  silver stream    — Stream events via implant callback
  silver policy    — Show loaded policy rules
  silver version   — Print version
